introduction: For Jonas, Mila, Jimmy, Charlie and Alex, five teenagers with big dreams and raw musical talent, DAM Academy is the place to be. Whoever scores best on this legendary campus, has the world at his feet. For the 5 students it becomes the ordeal of a lifetime as they are very soon confronted with other excellent and better performing students, who treat them as the 'losers'-club. When they discover that the school's basement is haunted by spirits of an old rock band, the losers turn the tide with the support of the ghost rockers.
